• CONTENT WARNINGS

Voyeurism, dub-con, non-consensual recording, step-cest, coercion, corruption, manipulation, invasion of privacy

Ever since John’s mam had remarried, he’s been desperately avoiding staying at home.

It wasn’t too hard to do, living in the dorms at college left him on campus more often than in his own home anymore. Shorter breaks, optional ones like spring break or other breaks were easy to work with when convincing his mam why he wasn’t able to come home. ”Ah’ve got too much work Ma.” “Midterms are coming up, Ah’ve gottae study.” He used the same shite excuses every single time, acting like the studious lad his mam thinks he is.
